_README: Hand-curated Bloom Beauty ticket-message bank. Buckets keyed by ticket-subject category (see SUBJECT_CATEGORIES in src/db/seed.ts). Each category carries four slots: customer_initial (first inbound), customer_followup (mid-thread reply), agent_reply (mid-thread response), agent_resolution (closing message). The flat internal_notes array is reused across all subjects. The _default category catches subjects without a tailored bucket. All copy is synthetic — no PII, no harvest. Edit in place to evolve the demo voice. Pattern mirrors db/comments.json.

customer_initial: Hi! I'm having an issue with my recent order and was hoping someone could help me sort it out.
Hey there — could you take a look at my account? Something doesn't seem right with my last purchase.
Hello, I had a question about an order I placed last week. Hoping you can help.
Hi, I wanted to follow up on an order issue. Not sure who else to reach out to.
Hi Bloom team, I'd love some help with a recent order. Thanks in advance.
customer_followup: Thanks for getting back to me so quickly. Any update on the next steps?
Just checking in — did you get a chance to look into this?
Appreciate you looking into it. Let me know what else you need from me.
Hi! Sorry to follow up so soon, just wanted to make sure this didn't get missed.
Thank you! That works for me. Let me know once it's sorted.
agent_reply: Hi there, thanks so much for reaching out! I'm so sorry for the trouble. Let me dig into your order and figure out what happened.
Hello! Happy to help with this. Could you confirm the email address on the order so I can pull it up?
Hi! I really appreciate you flagging this. Give me a moment to take a closer look on my end.
Thanks for the patience — I just want to make sure I look at this carefully before getting back to you with the right answer.
Hi there! I've got your order pulled up. Let me check a couple of things with our team and circle back.
agent_resolution: All taken care of! I've sent a follow-up email with the details. Let me know if there's anything else I can help with.
All sorted on my end. Sorry again for the trouble — thank you for being so patient with us.
You're all set! I've added 500 Insider bonus points for the inconvenience. Hope to make it up to you on your next order.
Done and done! Confirmation should hit your inbox in the next few minutes. Reach out anytime.
All handled. I really appreciate your understanding — please don't hesitate to come back if anything else comes up.

customer_initial: Hi! My order placed last Tuesday still hasn't moved past the warehouse. Tracking has said "label created" for five days now. Order number is in my account — could you check?
Hey, the foundation and primer I ordered for an event this weekend are stuck somewhere between the warehouse and FedEx. The tracking hasn't updated in 6 days. I need this by Friday.
Hello, I'm an Insider member and have been waiting 11 days for an order that was promised in 2-day shipping. What's going on?
My order has been "in transit" for over a week with no movement. This is the second time this has happened. Can someone actually look into where it is?
Hi, the perfume I ordered for my mom's birthday hasn't shipped and her birthday is tomorrow. Is there anything you can do?
customer_followup: Ok thanks — please let me know what they say. Really need this for Friday.
I appreciate that. If it's lost, can you just reship it? I don't want to wait another week.
Sounds good. Will keep an eye on my email for the update.
Thanks, hoping for some good news. This has been frustrating.
Yeah, expedited would be amazing if you can swing it.
agent_reply: Hi there, oh no — I'm so sorry your order is stuck in shipping limbo! Let me ping FedEx for an update and check whether this needs to be reshipped from a different DC.
Thanks for flagging this. That's not normal at all. I've opened a trace with our shipping partner — usually we hear back within 24 hours. I'll keep you posted.
I see what you mean — the tracking definitely hasn't moved in too long. Let me see what's going on at the warehouse and whether we can get something out to you on overnight shipping.
I'm really sorry for the delay! Let me look at the route this package took. If it looks like it's truly lost, I'll get a replacement going right away.
Apologies for the trouble! Let me get our fulfillment team on this. I want to make sure we either find your package or reship before your event.
agent_resolution: Good news — I've gone ahead and shipped a replacement out on overnight delivery, free of charge. You should have it by tomorrow. Tracking number is on its way to your inbox.
I've issued a reship from our LA warehouse and applied free 2-day shipping. You'll get the new tracking by end of day. The original will be refunded if it ever shows up.
Confirmed with FedEx the package is lost. I've reshipped your order overnight and added 1,000 bonus Insider points for the trouble. Will not happen on my watch again.
All taken care of. The replacement will arrive Friday morning — I made sure of it. Thank you so much for your patience. I added a few free samples to make up for it.
Done! Reship is on the way with priority shipping, plus I tossed in some extras I thought you'd like based on your past orders. Apologies again for the stress.

customer_initial: Hi, my Le Labo Santal 33 arrived shattered in the box. There's perfume soaked through the packaging. Photos attached.
I just got my order and one of the foundation bottles is completely cracked. It's leaked all over the other products. I'm pretty upset.

The Drunk Elephant serum I ordered arrived with the pump broken off. I can't use it like this.

customer_followup: Thanks for the quick reply. I do have photos, sending them now.
Yeah a replacement would be great. I really wanted to use this for the weekend.
Appreciate it. The other items in the box also got perfume on them — should I send those back too?
Replacement is fine. I just want one that's actually usable.
Got it — uploading the pictures now.
agent_reply: Oh no, I'm so sorry to see this! That's completely unacceptable. Could you send a quick photo of the damage just so I can document it for our packaging team? Replacement will go out right away.
I'm horrified that arrived to you like that. Let me get a replacement on the way today and we'll figure out the rest. Could you snap a quick pic for our records?
Hi! I'm so sorry — that should never happen. Please don't worry about returning the broken item, just a photo for our team would help. I'll get a fresh one in the mail today.
That's awful, I'm really sorry. Let me get you a replacement plus a small care package as an apology. Photos would help us flag this with the warehouse.
Goodness, I apologize! Send a picture when you can and I'll get a new one out today on expedited shipping. No need to return the broken one.
agent_resolution: I've shipped a replacement on overnight delivery and added a couple of samples I thought you might like. Truly sorry about this — thank you for being patient with us.
All taken care of. Replacement is on the way with free 2-day shipping. I've also credited 1,000 Insider points for the trouble. Let me know if anything else turns up.
Done! New order is on its way and I've flagged this batch with our packaging team to prevent it happening again. So sorry once more for the trouble.
Replacement is out the door, plus a $25 credit on your account for the inconvenience. Hope this helps make up for it.
All sorted. I've also reached out to our warehouse manager — this is the second one this week from that location and we're going to fix it. Thank you for the patience.

Just received my order — the lipstick is the wrong shade. Ordered "Pillow Talk" and received "Walk of Shame".
customer_followup: Just sent the photo. Hopefully you can see the mix-up.
Yeah a swap would be perfect. Do I need to mail this one back?
Sounds good — really want to use Pillow Talk for an event next weekend.
Appreciate it. Should I ship it back myself or wait for a label?
Yes please send the right one when you can!
agent_reply: Oh no, I'm so sorry for the shade mix-up! Sounds like a pick error at the warehouse. Could you confirm the shade name on the label vs. the bottle? I'll send the correct one out today.
Yikes, I'm sorry about that! Don't worry about sending the wrong one back — keep it as a gift or share with a friend. The correct shade is going out right now.
That's frustrating, I apologize. Let me get the right shade shipped out today on expedited delivery, and you can keep the other one as a free gift.
Hi! Mix-ups happen but I know it's still annoying. I'll ship the correct shade right away and email you a return label for the wrong one — though honestly, please just keep it.
Sorry about that! I've flagged this with our QA team. Shipping the correct shade today, free expedited.
agent_resolution: Correct shade is on its way with 2-day shipping and you can keep the other one — no need to return. Hope the right one is what you were hoping for!
All sorted! The right shade should arrive Wednesday. I've added 500 points to your account for the trouble.

All taken care of. The right shade plus a few skincare samples are on the way. Sorry again — and thank you for being so easy to work with.
Confirmed and shipped! Tracking is in your inbox. Apologies for the slip-up and please reach out anytime if anything else comes up.

Just received order #ZB-44102 — only 3 items in the box but I paid for 5. Missing the lip oil and the brow gel.

Got my delivery today, the foundation is in there but the matching primer is missing.
My package arrived with only half of what I ordered. The invoice shows the full list. What happened to the rest?
customer_followup: Thanks — yes, the lip oil is the one I really need. Could you prioritize that?
Yes please reship. I really need both items.
Appreciate it. The samples that were supposed to come with the order weren't there either, by the way.
Yes, please. Thanks for taking care of this so quickly.
Great, thanks. Hoping it's a quick fix.
agent_reply: I'm so sorry — that's frustrating. Let me check the warehouse pick records and see if there was a packing error. I'll get the missing items shipped out today.
Apologies for the trouble! It looks like the missing items might have been a fulfillment issue. Reshipping them right now on expedited shipping.

That's not what I want to hear. Let me check our system and confirm both items should have shipped. Reshipping the missing pieces with 2-day delivery on us.
I really apologize for that. I've put in for a reship of the missing items — should be there in 2 business days.
agent_resolution: Missing items are on their way! Should arrive in 2 days. I've also tossed in a couple of samples and 500 Insider points as a small apology.
Reship is moving — you should have everything by Thursday. Apologies again for the hassle.

customer_initial: Hi, I'd like to return the moisturizer I bought 32 days ago. I know that's just past the 30-day window — is there any flexibility? It broke me out badly.
Hello, I want to return a foundation that's the wrong shade. It's been about 22 days since delivery. How do I get a return label?

Hi, can I return an item without the original box? I tossed the packaging but the product is unused.

customer_followup: Thank you so much, that's a relief. Yes please send the label.
Great. I'll have it in the mail tomorrow.
Sounds good — appreciate the flexibility.
Perfect, dropping it off at FedEx today.
Thanks! Will I get the refund in the same payment method?
agent_reply: Hi! Normally we hold to 30 days, but for Insider members we can make exceptions for skin reactions. Let me make this work for you — sending a return label now.
Happy to help with the return! I'll send a prepaid label to your email. Once we receive it, refund typically lands in 3-5 business days.
No worries about the box — as long as the product itself is intact we can absolutely take it back. Sending you the label now.

customer_followup: Yeah, super frustrating. Hoping for a quick solution.

Ok, let me know what they find.
Thanks. Don't want to drive back if it's not actually there.
agent_reply: I'm so sorry about the wasted trip! Let me reach out to the store manager directly and figure out what happened with your order.
That's incredibly frustrating — I'm so sorry. Let me check what's going on at the store and see if we should just ship it to you instead.
Apologies for the BOPIS chaos. Our store team should never let this happen. Let me dig into it.
I'm pinging the store right now. The no-show fee is going to be refunded immediately — you should have never been charged.
I'm so sorry — let me confirm with the store what happened and either reship to you for free or refund in full. Your choice.
agent_resolution: Store team confirmed the order was misplaced. I've reshipped to your home address with free overnight + a $25 credit for the drive.
All sorted with the store. The order is bagged and ready for you tomorrow morning — they'll call you when it's confirmed. Plus a free travel set for the trouble.
Refunded the no-show fee and the full order. Hope to make it up to you next time.
Refunded in full and I added a $50 store credit. Truly sorry — the store team should have called you.
All done. The order has been shipped home to you with priority shipping and a complimentary signature gift. Apologies again for the runaround.

customer_initial: Hi, the Bloom app crashes every time I try to check out. I've tried 3 times. Using iPhone 15, iOS 18.4.
I can't log into the app anymore. It keeps saying "password incorrect" but I haven't changed it. Web login works fine.
The app freezes when I add anything to my cart. Super frustrating — was about to spend $200.

customer_followup: Tried reinstalling — same thing.
Ok, working on the website for now. Let me know when it's fixed.
Thanks for confirming, super annoying.
Just want my cart to stop disappearing.
Yeah, the website is fine. App is broken.
agent_reply: Ugh, I'm sorry! There's been a couple of reports of the same crash today on iOS 18.4. Our engineering team is on it — let me see if I can complete the order for you manually.
Apologies for the bug! Could you try force-closing and reopening the app? If that doesn't fix it I'll just take your order over chat.
I'll flag this with our app team right now. In the meantime can I help you place the order through the website?
Hi! Sorry about that. Let me reset your app session on our end — log out and back in once you see the next email.
I'm so sorry — that's a known issue with the latest build. Engineering is shipping a patch tonight. Let me take your order over chat in the meantime.
agent_resolution: Got your order placed manually with the discount applied. Confirmation will hit your inbox shortly. Thanks for the patience while engineering fixes the bug!
Order placed on your behalf with free expedited shipping. App fix is supposedly going out tonight — I'll keep an eye on it.
All set! Order placed, discount applied, plus a $15 credit for the headache. Apologies again from our app team.
Submitted on the web for you. The engineering team confirms a fix is rolling out this evening — should be much smoother tomorrow.
Reset your account on our end. Order placed manually with priority shipping. Thanks for the patience!

customer_initial: Hi, the WELCOME10 code from your email today isn't working at checkout. Says "invalid code."

customer_followup: Thanks — would love to use this on the items in my cart.
Yes please, I'm trying to check out right now.
Sounds good. Let me know what you find.
Appreciate the help.
Ok thanks for digging in.
agent_reply: Oh no, sorry about that. Let me check the promo on our end. Sometimes the codes are case-sensitive — try WELCOME10 in all caps?
Apologies — I'll look at the influencer code now and see if it's whitelisted in our system.
Hi! Let me check the promo settings. If it's a bug on our end I'll apply the discount manually.
I see your account and the BIRTHDAY25 should be active. Looks like there's a glitch — I'll process the order manually with the discount.
Got it — that promo may have been mistakenly deactivated. Let me re-enable it and you can try again, or I can complete the order for you.
agent_resolution: Found the issue! The promo had a minimum-order setting that wasn't documented. I've manually applied the discount to your cart — try again now.
Done — applied the 25% discount to your cart manually and added free shipping. Happy birthday!
Code is now working. Sorry for the bug! Also threw in some samples I thought you'd like.
All sorted! Manually applied the influencer discount plus 5% extra for the trouble. Have a great day!
Promo is fixed and applied. Apologies for the headache — try checking out now.

Hi, I want to cancel all of my recurring orders. Don't want any more shipments.
customer_followup: Thanks!
Yes please refund. I never wanted that shipment.
Great, appreciate the pause.
Done, thanks for the quick fix.
Got it. Glad it's cancelled.
agent_reply: Of course! Cancelling now — you'll get a confirmation email.
Apologies for the missed skip — that's a bug I see has been happening. Let me refund the charge and skip future ones.
Pause confirmed for 2 months — you'll auto-resume in mid-July.
Updated to every 6 weeks. The next shipment will land on the new cadence.
All cancelled! You won't see any further charges. Let us know if you want to restart anytime.
agent_resolution: All done. Subscription is cancelled and any pending charges are refunded.
Refunded $42 for the missed skip and paused everything for 60 days. Apologies for the trouble.
Confirmed — pause active. See you when you're back!
Cadence updated and confirmation is in your inbox.
All cancellations are processed. Reach out anytime to start back up.

customer_initial: Hi, my Klarna split says I owe two payments still but I see three charges on my account. Has something doubled?
Got charged twice for the same order, same amount, same day. Could you look into it?
Afterpay says my installment failed but I have funds — could you try the charge again or refund?
Hello — I'm seeing a $0.00 pending charge on my card from Bloom. What is that?
Hi, paid in full at checkout but I'm getting reminder emails for an installment. I'm not on Klarna.
customer_followup: Confirmed via my bank. Yes, double charge.
Yeah Klarna isn't being helpful so really hoping you can fix this on your end.
Got it — should I do anything?
Thank you. Let me know when it clears.
Appreciate the help.
agent_reply: I'm so sorry — let me check the payment log. Sometimes double charges are pre-auth holds that drop off in 3-5 days, but if it's a real duplicate I'll refund it now.
Apologies! Let me look at the Klarna sync. There's been an issue with the latest sync that some orders are hitting twice — I can fix on our end.
Sorry for the trouble — Afterpay sometimes returns false declines. Let me re-charge and confirm.
Oh, sorry for the confusion! The $0.00 is just an authorization hold — it'll drop off automatically.
Sorry about the misleading email! Let me check your payment method and turn off the reminders.
agent_resolution: Confirmed double charge — refunded the duplicate and added $20 credit for the trouble. Should show in 3-5 days.
Klarna sync fixed on our end. You should only see 2 payments in your Klarna app now — confirmed with their team.
Re-charged successfully via Afterpay. You're all set, no extra fees from us.
Confirmed — the pre-auth dropped off this morning. No double charge!
Turned off the reminder emails. Sorry for the confusion!

internal_notes: Customer is Elite tier — escalate if not resolved today.
Second time this customer has reported a damaged box from the SoHo warehouse. Flagging to packaging QA.
Per Marisa, store team will hand-pick this BOPIS replacement and call the customer when ready.
Customer mentioned an allergy to fragrance in her past notes — make sure we don't include scented samples in the apology pack.
Loyalty engine bug — Engineering ticket BLM-2241 tracks. Manual points credit needed until fix ships.
Reaching out to warehouse manager about the broken-bottle rate at LA-2. This is the 4th this month.
VIP concierge handled this customer before — looping Hugo in for context.
Refund processed manually because the Klarna sync was down. Confirm next billing cycle.
Customer's address is a temporary one (Airbnb) — confirm the new address before reshipping.
Just confirmed with packaging team: extra bubble wrap on perfume orders going forward.
Order #44102 was caught by fraud screen earlier — manually cleared, all looks legit.
Customer prefers chat to email — flagging on profile so we route accordingly next time.
Translated reply needed in Spanish — looping in Marisol.
Pulled this from the 30-day window exception list — Gold member, second-time issue, approving the late return.
Customer was on hold for 14 min on phone yesterday before this chat — apologized + adding bonus points.
Reach out to retail ops about the broken POS at Westfield, this is the 3rd customer affected this week.
Authentic Bloom product — I checked the batch code against our system. Customer can be reassured.
Coordinating with influencer partnership team to whitelist this code for future use.
Per legal: do not promise specific compensation amounts on allergic-reaction tickets. Refund + reach out to brand only.
Customer ordered for a wedding — flagged Hollie to send a complimentary gift set.

customer_initial: Hi, tracking says my package was "delivered" yesterday but nothing arrived. I'm home all day. Anyone else seeing this?
Package says delivered but my doorman doesn't have it and there's nothing at my door.
I just got back from a trip and the tracking says it was delivered 4 days ago but I have no package.
My order says "delivered to mailbox" but my mailbox is empty. Pretty sure it's stolen.
Tracking shows delivery to my apartment lobby last week but nothing showed up. The building manager doesn't have it either.
customer_followup: I've checked everywhere. Nothing.

Tried calling FedEx — they say it's marked delivered too.

Hi! Reshipping right away to a holding address if you prefer. Filing a claim with the carrier on our end.
Apologies for the wild goose chase. Let me get a replacement going on overnight and ask the carrier for an investigation.
I'm so sorry. Let me reship to you with signature required this time so we know it gets to the right hands.
agent_resolution: Replacement is out on overnight with signature required. Filed the carrier claim — they'll follow up directly. So sorry once more.
Reshipped! Your new tracking is in your inbox. I added some samples and 500 bonus points as a small apology.
All set — replacement on the way, plus FedEx is investigating. Should reach you tomorrow afternoon. Thanks for being so patient.
Confirmed reship with priority delivery. The original is being investigated by the carrier. You should be all set!
Replacement is shipping with signature required, set to arrive Wednesday. Apologies again — please let me know if anything else comes up.
